chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-633 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of M.A.No.3008/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 24.07.2025 Syed Muhammad Mehdi Shah, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Asstt. A. G a/w ASI Zulfiqar Ali. -.-.-.-.- At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner places on record a copy of the FIR bearing Crime No.54/2025 registered at PS Sijawal, under sections 506/2, 34, PPC under the cover of his statement dated 24.07.2025. He submits that in laws of the petitioner No.1 has got registered case against the in laws of petitioner No.2. Since it is not subject matter of this case, therefore, the petitioners or the accused therein are at liberty to file appropriate application for seeking remedy available to them in accordance with law. Today I.O of the case bearing Crime No.41/2025 registered against the petitioner No.2 regarding alleged abduction of petitioner N.1 at PS Sijawal under sections 365-B, 452, 34, PPC 3TiP Act is present and submits that he will record the statement of the petitioner No.1 and in view of the statement he will submit the requisite report u/s 173, Cr.P.C before the concerned Court within 15 days seeking disposal of the above FIR, in accordance with law. In view of above, learned Counsel for the petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of the petition with direction to the official respondents to provide protection toe the petitioners in accordance with law. Learned Asstt. A. G has no objection Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of along with listed application in the terms stated above.
G has no objection Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of along with listed application in the terms stated above. Judge Judge M.Y.Panhwar/**
